description_long: This is a large, modern office building characterized by a combination of two main volumes: a taller rectangular tower and a shorter, wider podium structure. The facade features extensive blue-tinted glass windows arranged in horizontal bands, interspersed with white and light blue solid panels. The base of the building includes a glass-walled entrance area, likely serving as a lobby or reception, and the ground level is set back with a covered entryway. The podium section displays a series of horizontal stripes, suggesting either decorative cladding or continuous window bands, and the upper tower has a flat roof with a small rooftop structure. The building's exterior is clean and geometric, with minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality and transparency. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for a corporate or business district.
description: A modern, multi-story office building with blue-tinted glass windows, white and light blue panels, and a prominent glass-walled entrance. The structure features a tall tower and a horizontally striped podium, giving it a sleek, professional look.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main glass-walled entrance, blue window bands, and the taller tower section.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the horizontal stripes of the podium and the full height of the tower.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the podium's striped facade and the back of the tower with minimal window detail.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the solid rear facade of the tower and the podium's layered structure.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows, evenly spaced and aligned across each floor, with some sections featuring continuous glass curtain walls.
